Precision Gauge Manufacturing for Critical Tolerances

ISO-certified gauge solutions engineered for automotive, aerospace, and manufacturing industries. Custom and standard gauges built to exacting specifications.

ISO 9001:2015 Certified
20+ Years Experience
Micron-Level Precision
Custom Solutions

What We Do

Standard Gauges

Complete line of plug, ring, snap, and thread gauges manufactured to ASME B89.1.5 and ISO 1938 standards.

Custom Gauge Design

Engineering services for special-purpose gauges designed to your exact specifications and tolerances.

Calibration Services

NIST-traceable calibration and certification for all gauge types with fast turnaround.

Industries We Serve

Automotive Manufacturing
Aerospace & Defense
Medical Device Manufacturing
Oil & Gas Equipment
Precision Machining
Tool & Die

Product Overview

Plain Gauges

Plug, ring, and snap gauges for dimensional inspection. Available in standard sizes or custom configurations.

Thread Gauges

UN, UNJ, Metric, NPT, and custom thread forms. Class X, XX, and XXX tolerance grades available.

Carbide Gauges

Superior wear resistance for high-volume production environments. Sizes from 0.010" to 12.000".

Master Gauges

Setting masters and calibration standards for gauge verification and quality system compliance.

Special Gauges

Custom solutions including form gauges, fixture gauges, and application-specific inspection tools.

Custom Gauge Solutions

When standard gauges don't meet your requirements, our engineering team designs and manufactures custom solutions. From concept to delivery, we work with your specifications to ensure perfect fit and function.

  • In-house engineering and design
  • Reverse engineering capabilities
  • Prototype development
  • Production runs of any quantity
  • Full documentation and certification
Discuss Your Project

Why Merc Technologies

Precision Manufacturing

State-of-the-art CNC grinding and lapping equipment ensures micron-level accuracy on every gauge.

Quality Assurance

ISO 9001:2015 certified processes with 100% inspection and full traceability documentation.

Fast Turnaround

Standard gauges ship in 5-7 days. Custom gauges typically delivered in 3-4 weeks.

Technical Support

Expert application engineers available to help select the right gauge for your needs.

Material Options

Tool steel, carbide, chrome plated, and specialized materials for demanding applications.

Competitive Pricing

Direct manufacturer pricing with volume discounts available for production quantities.

Use Case: Automotive Shaft Inspection

Challenge

A Tier 1 automotive supplier needed to inspect transmission shafts with a tolerance of ±0.0002" at high volume (10,000+ parts per day). Standard commercial gauges wore out too quickly, causing quality issues and production delays.

Solution

Merc Technologies designed custom carbide snap gauges with hardened anvils specifically for this application. The gauge design included wear indicators and quick-change contact points.

Results

  • Gauge life increased from 2 weeks to 6 months
  • Inspection time reduced by 40%
  • Zero quality escapes since implementation
  • $45,000 annual savings in gauge replacement costs

Ready to Improve Your Quality Process?

Contact our engineering team to discuss your gauge requirements. We'll help you select or design the perfect solution.
